title: 3.28.0 Hotfix 11
full_text:
3.28.0 Hotfix 11
3.28.0 Hotfix 11
Fixed an issue where legacy (pre-3.28) maps in permanent leagues would lose Delirium layers and flavour text when converted to the new map items. Maps that have already been converted may be retroactively fixed by this, but unfortunately that is only possible if the map hasn't been moved or modified in any way since 3.28 was released.
Fixed a bug where currency items could be corrupted.
Fixed client crash.
